source.description: Six-panel marker-doodle contact sheet generated with the process-first workflow, then cropped into step frames and the finished image.
source.notes: Chosen after a quick event check because the FIFA World Cup is active in June-July 2026, but it stays distinct from Sketcha's soccer ball subject.

process_strategy: A six-panel marker process builds one trophy sticker from cup and base guides to handles, shine marks, confetti, and gold marker fill before the final outline pass.

final_elements.name: trophy cup bowl
final_elements.description: A rounded cup bowl centered as the main trophy shape.

final_elements.name: small trophy base
final_elements.description: A short stem and blocky base under the cup.

final_elements.name: side handles
final_elements.description: Two curved handles attached to the cup sides.

final_elements.name: bold black outline
final_elements.description: Thick handmade marker edges around the trophy and base.

final_elements.name: shine marks
final_elements.description: Small white highlight areas and simple sparkle marks on the cup.

final_elements.name: confetti dots
final_elements.description: A few tiny celebration dots around the trophy.

final_elements.name: gold marker fill
final_elements.description: Bright yellow-gold marker fill with visible streaks.

final_elements.name: orange shadow accents
final_elements.description: Orange marker accents along the lower cup and base.

frames.visible_job: Places the cup bowl, short stem, and base guides.
Adds curved handles to both sides of the cup.
Traces the trophy and base with a bold black marker contour.
Adds shine marks on the cup and small confetti dots around it.
Adds gold marker fill and orange shadow accents to the existing trophy.

final_step.visible_job: Only thickens existing outlines, strengthens gold/orange marker fill, and cleans existing shine and confetti marks.

rejection_checks: No trophy handle, base, shine, confetti, or marker color should first appear in the final image.
The final must keep the same centered trophy shape, base placement, and color plan as the step frames.
The final must read as a handmade marker sticker, not a clean vector icon.
